nasb.text: For just as the lightning comes from the east and flashes even to the west, so will the coming of the Son of Man be.

esv.text: For as the lightning comes from the east and shines as far as the west, so will be the coming of the Son of Man.

cnv.text: 電光怎樣從東方閃出來，一直照到西方，人子降臨的時候，也是這樣。

ccb.text: 人子降临时的情形就像闪电从东方发出一直照到西方。

csbs.text: 因为就像闪电从东边发出，直照到西边，人子的来临也将要这样。
